payload.label: cup
payload.short_description: clear plastic cup with blue rim
payload.long_description: Close-up (~0.4 m) of a tall transparent plastic cup with a blue rim or lid and vertical dark printed markings on the side; tapered cylindrical shape, slightly blurred/low-resolution, and the object is partially cropped by the image edge.
